name: Festi hf.
summary: Festi hf., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the retail sale of fuel in Iceland. It operates through Kr√É¬≥nan, N1, and ELKO segments. The company operates 68 fuel service stations, 11 electricity service stations in co-operation with ON, and one methane service station for vehicles; 27 service stations that offer refreshments and healthy snacks under the Nesti brand; 11 lubrication and tyre garages; and six corporate stores and 52 maritime fuel pumps. It also operates 22 convenience stores under the Kr√É¬≥nan and Kr brand names; two convenience stores under the Kjarval brand name; a store under the N√É¬≥at√É¬∫n brand name; five electronic stores under the Elko brand name, as well as an online store; and a warehouse hotel that provides product storage, packing, labelling, and product distribution services under the Bakkinn brand. It also leases non-residential real estate properties. The company was formerly known as N1 hf. and changed its name to Festi hf. in September 2018. Festi hf. is headquartered in Kopavogur, Iceland.
